items.title: Trump Administration Reportedly Exploring Taking Stakes In Quantum Computing Companies— IonQ, Rigetti And D-Wave Discussing Move
items.description: The Trump administration is reportedly in talks to take equity stakes in U.S. quantum computing firms like IonQ, Rigetti, and D-Wave in exchange for federal funding, as part of a broader strategy of government investment in strategic tech companies.

items.title: AI hype is real, but a Nobel-winning economist warns profits aren't guaranteed
items.description: Investors are betting big on AI — but Richard Thaler says don't count on easy profits.

items.title: The OpenSSL Corporation and the OpenSSL Foundation Celebrate the Success of the Inaugural OpenSSL Conference in Prague
items.description: The OpenSSL Corporation and the OpenSSL Foundation celebrate the success of the inaugural OpenSSL Conference, held in Prague, October 7-9. This was the first time in the history of the OpenSSL Project that the full community met in person. Developers, legal experts, and users from academics, committers, distributions, individuals, large businesses, and small businesses came together to discuss project direction, share experience, and collaborate on the future of secure digital communication.
